name: Contentsquare Digital Experience Analytics API
what_it_does: Contentsquare REST API for digital experience analytics platform. Enables AI agents to query session data, retrieve heatmap and zone-based analytics, access user journey funnels, export behavioral metrics, and integrate experience analytics into digital optimization workflows. Contentsquare captures user interactions (clicks, scrolls, mouse movement) for UX analysis and conversion optimization.
use_cases: Querying zone-based engagement metrics from UX analytics agents
Retrieving session funnel and journey data from conversion optimization agents
Exporting behavioral analytics data from BI integration agents
Monitoring page performance and user frustration signals from UX monitoring agents
not_for: Basic web analytics without behavioral depth (use GA4)
Product analytics for SaaS applications without website focus
Real-time operational monitoring without UX context
best_when: A digital marketing or UX team wants AI agents to extract and analyze behavioral data from Contentsquare to identify optimization opportunities and feed insights into personalization or A/B testing platforms.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Session recordings and behavioral data contain detailed user interaction patterns. Personal data subject to GDPR consent requirements. Contentsquare is heavily regulated under European privacy law.

auth.notes: Contentsquare uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for API access. Scopes control access to different data types. Enterprise API access requires account setup and DPA agreement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual contracts
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on sessions tracked; negotiated contracts
pricing.notes: French company (Paris HQ). Enterprise digital experience analytics. Acquired Heap Analytics in 2023. Pricing negotiated per sessions/year.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per account; analytics queries are compute-intensive

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Behavioral session data includes detailed user interaction patterns — strict GDPR requirements
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API requiring customer access
Analytics queries are compute-intensive — use async export endpoints for large datasets
Data freshness lag: analytics data typically 24-48 hours behind
French company with strong EU privacy defaults — DPA required for API access
Acquired Heap Analytics in 2023 — product roadmap in transition
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Detailed behavioral data with GDPR implications. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. French company — EU-first. OAuth2 scopes. DPA required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Detailed behavioral PII data. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. French company. DPA required. OAuth2 with scopes.
